next_steps: CT angiography of the neck to rule out vascular pathology such as pseudoaneurysm
Direct laryngoscopy and examination under anesthesia with formal excisional or deep incisional biopsy
Frozen section analysis during biopsy to confirm malignancy and guide further tissue sampling
Immunohistochemical staining including desmin, MyoD1, myogenin, and pan-cytokeratin
Molecular testing including FOXO1 FISH if rhabdomyosarcoma is confirmed
